images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young, sexy Japanese female model, echoing a top‑tier gravure idol, standing in a snow‑draped forest with straight black silky hair catching soft light. Laughing naturally, she clutches a small vintage book, eyes sparkling and grin infectious. Her confident, sporty posture and expressive eyes give an energetic, viral vibe.8k photo, Large breasts
